required_proof_steps: Verify all preprocessor node names required by wave11_pose_preprocessor_registry.json are visible.
Verify ControlNetLoader and ControlNetApplyAdvanced or engine-specific equivalents are visible.
Generate and save control maps for DWPose/OpenPose, depth, normal, Canny, and lineart using non-production test inputs.
Run edge/depth/pose QA scripts on generated control maps.
Run one minimal SDXL Canny generation through current Main Flow branch and collect evidence.
Run one minimal DWPose/OpenPose branch after the workflow node graph is added.
Block promotion until outputs exist under expected Main_Flow or module prefixes.
